节点.功能描述: Update the ComponentContent based on the provided parameters.
注释信息: @param { T } args - Parameters used to update the ComponentContent, which must match the types required by the builder bound to the ComponentContent.

parameters.说明: Parameters used to update the ComponentContent, which must match the types required by the builder bound to the ComponentContent.

节点.功能描述: Reuse the ComponentContent based on the provided parameters. to the reuse of all top-level custom components in the ComponentContent. They should include the content required for the constructor parameters of each custom component; otherwise, undefined behavior may occur. Calling this method will synchronously trigger the aboutToReuse lifecycle callback of the internal custom components, with these parameters passed as the callback's input. The default value is undefined, in which case the custom components in the ComponentContent will directly use the data source from the construction phase.
注释信息: @param { Object } [param] - Parameters for reusing ComponentContent. These parameters will be directly applied

parameters.说明: Object } [param] - Parameters for reusing ComponentContent. These parameters will be directly applied

节点.功能描述: Reuse the ReactiveComponentContent based on the provided parameters. directly applied to the reuse of all top-level custom components in the ReactiveComponentContent. They should include the content required for the constructor parameters of each custom component; otherwise, undefined behavior may occur. Calling this method will synchronously trigger the aboutToReuse lifecycle callback of the internal custom components, with these parameters passed as the callback's input. The default value is undefined, in which case the custom components in the ReactiveComponentContent will directly use the data source from the construction phase.

节点.功能描述: Recycle the ReactiveComponentContent.
Dispose the ReactiveComponentContent immediately.
Notify ReactiveComponentContent to update the configuration to trigger a reload of the ReactiveComponentContent.
Flushes the current state changes to update the ReactiveComponentContent immediately. This forces a synchronous update of the compponent with the latest state values.

Set if the ReactiveComponentContent inherits the freezing policy of the parent CustomComponent, ComponentContent, ReactiveComponentContent, BuilderNode, or ReactiveBuilderNode. CustomComponent, ComponentContent, ComponentContent, ReactiveComponentContent, BuilderNode, or ReactiveBuilderNode.
注释信息: @param { boolean } enabled - If the ReactiveComponentContent inherits the freezing policy of the parent

parameters.说明: If the ReactiveComponentContent inherits the freezing policy of the parent
